name: Super Chocolate Chunk Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 4 squares of the chocolate into half-inch chunks and set aside.
2. Beat the margarine, sugars, eggs, and vanilla until light and fluffy. Mix in flour, baking powder, salt, chocolate chunks, and walnuts. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Drop dough by heaping teaspoonfuls, about 2 inches apart, onto greased cookie sheets. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow cooling for 5 minutes before removing from the cookie sheets and placing on wire racks.
4. Melt remaining chocolate. Spread the top half of each cooled cookie with melted chocolate. Let stand on wax paper until the chocolate is firm. Makes 4 dozen cookies.
